entity.summary: Protocol-level decentralized exchange built into the BitShares blockchain and launched with BitShares X on July 19, 2014. The project consolidated into the BitShares name later in 2014 and continues through the official wallet, current documentation, and maintained BitShares Core releases.
entity.notes: HEI models the protocol-level DEX as one entity rather than separate wallet interfaces or chain deployments. BitShares X and the later BitShares identity are continuous. Current official documentation describes a global on-chain order book and the official wallet remains available.

events.title: BitShares X launched its on-chain exchange
events.description: The first live BitShares X chain launched on July 19, 2014 with a blockchain-integrated decentralized exchange for digital assets and market-pegged instruments.
events.notes: Exact launch date follows official BitShares history and contemporaneous reporting.

events.title: BitShares X consolidated into BitShares
events.description: During the late-2014 consolidation of BitShares projects, the X was dropped from BitShares X and the continuing blockchain and exchange became known as BitShares.
events.notes: Month-level consolidation marker; this was not a terminal event for the exchange protocol.

evidence.title: The History of BitShares
evidence.notes: Official documentation lists the BitShares X release by DACsunlimited on July 19, 2014.

evidence.title: DAC Sun Limited Launches First Official BitShares X Chain
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report confirms the July 19 live-chain and distributed-trading launch.

evidence.title: What is BitShares?
evidence.notes: Official documentation explains that late-2014 project consolidation dropped the X and produced the BitShares identity.

evidence.title: BitShares decentralized exchange documentation
evidence.notes: Current documentation describes the global protocol-level order book and active DEX functions.

evidence.title: BitShares current platform and Core release
evidence.notes: Official site exposes the wallet, DEX, documentation, and current BitShares Core release.
